ec2.spotfleet.acceleratorcountrequest.Cf: The minimum and maximum number of accelerators (GPUs, FPGAs, or AWS Inferentia chips) on an instance. To exclude accelerator-enabled instance types, set `Max` to `0`.

ec2.spotfleet.acceleratorcountrequest.Ma.Description: The maximum number of accelerators. To specify no maximum limit, omit this parameter. To exclude accelerator-enabled instance types, set `Max` to `0`.

ec2.spotfleet.acceleratorcountrequest.Mi.Description: The minimum number of accelerators. To specify no minimum limit, omit this parameter.
